series_metadata.series_title: The Fridley Nomination Forms and Award Applications
series_metadata.series_description: The Fridley Nomination Forms and Award Applications recognize BWC employees who have helped BWC achieve internal priorities of providing exceptional customer service, managing income responsibility, controlling costs, improving internal controls and communicating clearly and with integrity. The nominations are scored by a committee to determine a recipient of the Fridley. The award records include a database or spreadsheet of who receives each award and the date they receive it.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan the Fridley Nomination Forms and Award Applications for conversion to electronic form. Retain the original Fridley Nomination Forms for quality assurance, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic versions of the Fridley Nomination Forms and Award Applications in the Human Resources Department’s SharePoint site for two (2) years, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
